title: Mickey Joe's CIT Namables (outdated OptiFine dependent pack)
description: The named anvil variants of Mickey Joe's "Barely Default", as a separate pack. Nothing else. Renamable variants of Netherite sets that add all of the gear from Mc Story Mode, Dungeons, Legends, and more!
body:
⚠ in order for this pack to function, users must either install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/), or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)!

These are some of my best textures taken from my main pack, [Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default/).

### **[For a comprehensible sheet to view all of Barely Default's renamable variants on, click here.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kSjHyrZ60fVfBGip9Ho6QbFmMZ1CCtDfqIQLVj4hFvM/edit#)**

ALL THE CANON ARMOUR OF MINECRAFT IN ONE PACK!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Bs4oExEQzMw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Some colourful weapons in this texture pack](https://i.imgur.com/A7ftMbR.png)

MAP DOWNLOAD AND INSTALLATION TUTORIAL
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/74xf9mp4Kgg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
